Author: mapleterra
Name: Gachapon Machine
Punchline: Roll /random and win a prize — now with history, stats, custom prizes, sound, and party mode!
Description: A gachapon gambling minigame. Type /gachapon to open the machine, then roll /random to play — the sum of your rolls decides your prize tier, from Common up to the JACKPOT. Includes a pull history log, detailed stats (best sum, win streaks, luckiest day), fully customizable prizes and rules, jackpot sound effects, gil/payout tracking, and a party mode that tracks everyone's rolls on a leaderboard.
